creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
When updating jails inside poudriere after changing paths to some
directories of poudriere (I have installed an SSD and moved some
directories there), the update fails stating:
...8<--- »poudriere jail -u -j 102amd64«
Error: Unable to execute id(1) in jail. Emulation or ABI wrong.
--->8...

I have listet my jails using jls(8) (»jls«) and deleted the old and
wrong jails using jail(8) (»jail -r ${JID}«).

After that, creating a new jail works
»poudriere jail -c -j 102amd64 -a amd64 -v 10.2-RELEASE«
as well as updating it.

Regards,
 Kalten
